title: Consistent Hangul/CJK treatment: tappable characters with audio, no random romanisation
body:
## Current behaviour

When the AI sends responses, Hangul/CJK text is treated inconsistently:

1. **Random romanisation** — sometimes the AI writes "pojangmacha" or "juseyo" instead of showing the actual characters (포장마차, 주세요). Players who can't read romanisation get no value from it.
2. **No consistent interaction** — some characters are wrapped in `<KoreanText>` (tappable, shows tooltip with meaning + audio), but others are just plain text.
3. **Players can't tap to hear** — when Hangul appears in AI dialogue, there's no consistent way to tap a word and hear its pronunciation.
4. **Immersive text pattern is inconsistent** — scene and dialogue text should stay clean and natural, but current output can mix script and pronunciation in a distracting way.

## Expected behaviour

Every CJK word/phrase in the game should be treated consistently:
- **Always show the actual characters** (한글, 漢字, ひらがな), never bare romanisation
- **Keep immersive scene/dialogue text in native script only** — do not insert inline parenthetical romanisation like `포장마차 (pojangmacha)` into the main sentence flow
- **All CJK text should be tappable** — tap to hear TTS pronunciation
- **Tooltip on tap** should show: character + pronunciation/romanisation + meaning/translation
- If the AI sends romanisation, it should be rendered through the tooltip/card pattern or another clearly separated pronunciation UI, not jammed into the sentence itself

## Example

**Before:** "You're at a pojangmacha and the menu is basically all Hangul"
**After:** "You're at a 포장마차 and the menu is basically all 한글"

- 포장마차 and 한글 should be tappable with audio
- pronunciation/romanisation should live in the tooltip or dictionary card, clearly separated from the word itself
- avoid parentheses in immersive text unless there is an explicitly labeled learning UI outside the main dialogue flow

## Proposed improvements

- [ ] Enforce in AI system prompt: always output CJK characters, never bare romanisation
- [ ] Wrap all CJK text in `<KoreanText>` (or equivalent for ja/zh) for consistent tap-to-hear
- [ ] Ensure TTS plays on tap for any CJK word in dialogue, whisper, and exercises
- [ ] Add pronunciation/romanisation + translation in tooltip consistently
- [ ] Keep main dialogue copy free of inline parenthetical pronunciation clutter

## Context

- KoreanText component: `apps/client/components/shared/KoreanText.tsx`
- AI prompts: `apps/client/lib/ai/prompts/hangout-orchestrator.ts`, `introduction-hangout.ts`
- TTS: `apps/client/components/exercises/BlockCrush.tsx` (has working TTS pattern to reuse)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
